message:
refactor(bottom-sheet): portal rendering and improved drag interaction

Refactor the BottomSheet component to use React portals for rendering,
ensuring proper z-index stacking regardless of parent DOM structure.
This fixes issues where the sheet could be clipped or obscured by
ancestor overflow or transform contexts.

Key changes:
- Add createPortal for rendering backdrop and sheet to document.body
- Improve drag interaction: only start drag from non-content areas
- Add data-testid="bottom-sheet-backdrop" for testing
- Update pointer handling to prevent content scroll interference
- Corresponding test updates for new testid and portal behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
